vulnerability.reference: Clinicians over-rely on AI-restored images without verification, increasing risk of false diagnoses.
vulnerability.generated: Radiologists lack means to independently verify the authenticity of restored image details, trusting AI-enhanced scans as accurate.

impact.reference: Misdiagnosis causes patient harm, unnecessary procedures, and erodes trust in AI-assisted radiology.
impact.generated: Misdiagnosis from hallucinated anatomical structures, leading to incorrect clinical decisions and patient harm.

dose_response.reference: Hallucinated anatomical details from learned denoiser priors cause radiologists to over-rely on falsely detailed scans, leading to misdiagnosis and patient harm.
dose_response.generated: Learned denoiser priors hallucinating details in plug-and-play restoration, when radiologists interpret AI-enhanced medical images, trigger their lack of independent verification of restored details, leading to misdiagnosis from hallucinated anatomical structures and patient harm.
